author: YuChenSSR
description: An unofficial Obsidian integration for the xAI Grok Build CLI, based on Claudian. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: YuChenSSR
manifest.description: Unofficial Obsidian integration for ACP coding agents including xAI Grok Build and Cursor Agent, based on Claudian.
manifest.name: Buildian

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed
- Release Grok Build 0.1.1
- Change preview image from Preview.png to image.png
- Add preview png
- Create Grok Build Obsidian plugin
- 2.0.21
- fix: patch SDK import metadata for Obsidian
- 2.0.20
- fix: upgrade vulnerable claude dependencies (#717)
- 2.0.19
- fix: restore mod enter composer send (#715)
- feat: add Pi provider integration (#712)
- feat: render markdown in inline edit previews (#714)
- fix: guard OpenCode hydration against large metadata (#713)
- feat: add Claude custom model aliases
- 2.0.18
- fix: harden OpenCode ACP transport restarts (#685)
- fix: create OpenCode database directory before launch (#684)
- fix: AskUserQuestion "Other" custom input unreachable for Claude provider (#675)
- 2.0.17
- feat: support OpenCode ACP thinking levels (#676)

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/YuChenSSR/grok-build-obsidian/compare/...0.1.1
